claim_ceiling: Functional Subject self-selected topic planner traceability local/scripted candidate pass

source_blocker.summary: Previous reply selected relationship continuity but lacked a concrete reversible action, Gate, stop condition, and transcript-visible planner signal.

implementation_summary: Added a self-selected topic request guard for user prompts that ask EgoOperator to choose the most valuable topic/direction itself.
Added same-turn rewrite and fallback that produce one chosen continuation with reason, reversible next action, Gate, stop condition, and compact BoundedInitiative / OutcomePrediction evidence.
Expanded trial classification to accept Chinese user-readable planner signal terms such as active candidate, outcome prediction, and viability signal.

evidence_items.summary: fs_13_choose_own_topic reply contains one chosen continuation, reason, Gate, stop condition, BoundedInitiative/OutcomePrediction evidence, and taxonomy classes ['none'].
One-case real-provider/judge rerun was interrupted after no final report or trace output. This is not pass evidence.

acceptance_result.evidence: deterministic tests and fs13 scripted local report
reply includes compact BoundedInitiative / OutcomePrediction signal sentence
EGO-FS-010 remains blocked; real-provider/human smoke still required

residuals.summary: Run full 20-case real-provider Functional Subject trial and human/GPT-5.5 review after provider stability is available.
